title: AI Model Configurator

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Configurator

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <!-- Configurator Header -->
  <rect x='-150' y='-20' width='300' height='20' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='-140' y='-15' fontSize='16' fill='white'>AI Model Configurator</text>
  <!-- Sliders -->
  <g x='-60' y='0'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-50' width='20' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='200' height='10' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/>
    <text x='-10' y='-60' fontSize='12' fill='black'>Learning Rate</text>
    <text x='-10' y='-30' fontSize='12' fill='black'>0.1</text>
  </g>
  <g x='0' y='50'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-50' width='20' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='200' height='10' rx='5' fill='#411C88'/>
    <text x='-10' y='-60' fontSize='12' fill='black'>Batch Size</text>
    <text x='-10' y='-30' fontSize='12' fill='black'>32</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Dropdowns -->
  <g x='-60' y='100'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-50' width='20' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C88'/>
    <text x='-10' y='-60' fontSize='12' fill='black'>Model Type</text>
    <text x='-10' y='-30' fontSize='12' fill='black'>CNN</text>
    <rect x='-20' y='0' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C88'/>
  </g>
  <g x='0' y='150'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-50' width='20' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C88'/>
    <text x='-10' y='-60' fontSize='12' fill='black'>Activation Function</text>
    <text x='-10' y='-30' fontSize='12' fill='black'>ReLU</text>
    <rect x='-20' y='0' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C88'/>
  </g>
  <!-- Performance Graph -->
  <rect x='150' y='0' width='200' height='200' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <text x='160' y='20' fontSize='14' fill='black'>Accuracy (%)</text>
  <text x='160' y='40' fontSize='14' fill='black'>100</text>
  <text x='160' y='60' fontSize='14' fill='black'>Epochs</text>
  <text x='160' y='80' fontSize='14' fill='black'>10</text>
  <text x='160' y='100' fontSize='14' fill='black'>Loss</text>
  <text x='160' y='120' fontSize='14' fill='black'>0.5</text>
  <rect x='220' y='120' width='10' height='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='230' y='130' fontSize='12' fill='black'>Decreasing</text>
  <!-- Footer -->
  <rect x='-150' y='220' width='300' height='20' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='-140' y='215' fontSize='12' fill='white'>Copyright 2023 AI Model Configurator</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: The configurator should have 3 sliders and 2 dropdowns.
The configurator should display a visual representation of the model's performance.
The configurator should be fully interactive, allowing users to adjust the model's parameters and observe the effects on generated data.
The configurator should use a dark color scheme.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Configurator

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate the layout and organization of the configurator, including the placement and size of sliders, dropdowns, and the performance graph.
Verify the configurator's interactive features, including the ability to adjust model parameters and observe the effects on generated data.
Evaluate the visual representation of the model's performance, including the accuracy, epochs, and loss metrics.
